page_name: Data Check & Preparation / 数据检查与准备

disabled_actions: Save Report; standardization report export; formal quality score; formal analysis run; result generation
notes: Readiness rows cover expression matrix, sample annotation, clinical data, gene mapping, batch/platform, missing rate, and outlier detection.

page_name: Group & Design / 分组与分析设计
allowed_actions: edit/view group draft; comparison draft; covariate/design summary; gated preflight preview
disabled_actions: formal model run; formal DEG; report/export; treating ready_for_preflight as formal result
notes: Group setup and comparison/covariate switches remain draft/preflight surfaces with formalActionEnabled=false.

disabled_actions: Run Formal DEG; ORA; GSEA; KM/log-rank; Cox; clinical association; Generate Plot; Add to Report; Export Result; visible task write/preflight/formal run actions
result_semantics: preflight_only; resultSemanticKey=preflight_only; no DEG table; no fake plot

allowed_actions: view result/report gate preview; view preflight log; view empty result; view imported/testing preview when present
